title: 90gQ Create: Season 2
description: A simple create modpack. It aims to be a modpack with extra features to the famous Create mod. This time we have added magic mods.
body:
# Summary
90gQcreate: Season 2 is perfect modpack for anyone who want to play Create with their friends!

The core principle we had when creating this modpack was to enhance the vanilla experience with the Create-mod and vanilla-faithfull exploration.

We designed this modpack with the opinion that modpacks shouldn't necessarily be overly complicated.

# Season 2
This is the second edition of 90gQcreate! However, we have built this modpack from the ground up. We wanted to look at the first edition and improve it. So some mods are still here, some are gone, and a bunch of new stuff has been added. The Season 1 and Season 2 modpacks are not compatible with each other.

# Create-mod
What can I even say about Create that you don't already know. This mod is centered around the mod which adds satisfying-looking machinery to Minecraft. 

**Create** is at the core of this mod pack, which is why we've both added features from other mods to work with Create, as well as altering other mods so that nothing overshadows the Create mod. You will find that we've actually removed certain features from other mods if the function already is possible with Create, to ensure that Create is always in the center.

**CC: Tweaked**, which adds programmable computers, has been altered to make the mod more in line with Create. With some features removed completely to prevent it from "stepping on Create's toes".

# Vanilla Faithful
The second pillar in our mod-pack is vanilla faithful exploration. Because although we didn't want to make the mod-pack complicated, we wanted to awe the players and encourage them to explore the new landscapes and structures.

**Terralith** and **Biomes O' Plenty** generate a diverse world, which you immediately want to explore. **Towns and Towers**, **Valhelsia** and **YUNG's mods** improves and adds new structures and dungeons which you'll both recognize and be amazed by.

# Building
What's a modpack without some toys for the decorators and architects out there?

**Macaw's Mods**, **Chipped** and **Valhelsia** adds more decoration blocks and furniture, based on the vanilla look!

# Roleplay with Friends
**Simple Voice Chat** allow you to communicate with your friends, using a proximity-based in-game voice chat! **Carry On** allows you to pick up tile entities and mobs and carry them, **Incapacitated** lets your friends try to save you if you die, and **Grave Stones** stores your items if they fail to save you.

# Credits
This modpack was created by Lukasabbe, JidOsc, and WikiRaze, on behalf of Onlineföreningen SGC for their Roleplaying and Content creation server. Creative help was also provided by Naeeituls, Hundmos and MaxMix. Custom recipes were made by DrTid and Lukas. And the world spawn on the official server was built by Wiha and Duno.

We got the texture pack from https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/programmer-art-fix

# For Swedish speakers:
Om du talar Svenska, är över 13 år gammal och vill ha ett community att hänga i och en minecraft-server att spela på. Joina Onlineföreningen SGC: http://discord.sgc.se
